visual_analysis: The visual quality of the application is strong, featuring a clean layout with a structured hierarchy. The use of color is appropriate, particularly the green button that stands out, though there could be more contrast in text readability.
educational_analysis: The educational value is moderate, as the content presents the Bellman-Ford algorithm clearly but lacks interactive explanations or further instructional materials to guide the user through understanding the concept. The representation of graph edges is adequate, yet a visual representation of the graph itself could enhance comprehension.
